creator: ighighi@gmail.com
text:
lukemftpd(8) uses /etc/ftpd.conf

Quoting ftpd.conf(5):
FILES
     /etc/ftpd.conf                      This file.
     /usr/share/examples/ftpd/ftpd.conf  A sample ftpd.conf file.

But /usr/share/examples/ftpd/ftpd.conf is nowhere to be found

Fix: 

Import the file from NetBSD available at:
http://cvsweb.netbsd.org/bsdweb.cgi/src/share/examples/ftpd/ftpd.conf
How-To-Repeat: locate /ftpd.conf
